title: Writing - Part 2
description: Choose one of the following writing tasks and write your answer in 220-260 words.

tasks.title: Report
tasks.prompt: Your college principal has asked you to write a report on how students spend their free time and what leisure facilities they would like to see improved. Write your report.

tasks.title: Email/Letter
tasks.prompt: You have received an email from an English-speaking friend who is planning to visit your country for the first time. Write an email giving advice about what to see and do, and what to pack.

tasks.title: Review
tasks.prompt:
You have seen this announcement in an international magazine:
'We are looking for reviews of books or films that made you think differently about the world. Tell us what it was, why you recommend it, and what impact it had on you.'
Write your review.
